title: No More Blur
description: Removes the menu's blur rendering completely when the blurriness is set to 0%
body:
# Archived

Mojang has updated their code, and this mod will not work anymore.

# NoMoreBlur (Fabric)

This mod does one thing: skip rendering menu's blur effect when the blurriness is 0%,
which significantly increases the game's frame rate in menu screens.

## Why Use It?
In vanilla, the blur effect (introduced in 24w09a) will **still** render when the blurriness is set to 0%,
and it's really **unfriendly** to low-end devices.

## Requirements

Only Minecraft 24w10a (or higher versions) is required.

## License

This mod is licensed under MIT License, see LICENSE file for more information.
